summary: The user is getting back into playing guitar after years of inactivity and is seeking recommendations for acoustic-electric guitars and advice on fingerstyle techniques. They have signed up for a 6-week group lesson course at a local music shop and are interested in practicing with a metronome to improve their timing and rhythm.
